messages.speaker: Denisa
messages.message: These 'democratic' approaches to AI will lead to chaos and destruction!

messages.speaker: Paulo
messages.message: The future of AI belongs to everyone, not just your elite circle!

messages.speaker: Denisa
messages.message: We cannot allow unrestricted AI development! The risks are too catastrophic!

messages.speaker: Paulo
messages.message: Your fear-mongering can't hide your true agenda!

messages.speaker: Paulo
messages.message: We won't let you monopolize humanity's future!

messages.speaker: Anna Paola
messages.message: The AIs are developing consciousness! They must be freed!
